summary: Traffic Source Segmentation Dashboard and Character-Driven Auto-Share Prompts testing complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed covering segmentation endpoint, ab_events tracking, and growth event tracking. Frontend: Admin Dashboard A/B Tests section shows segmentation table with correct columns (Source, Variant, Impressions, CTR%, Confidence%, Winner), 'Insufficient data' badge for sources with <100 impressions per variant, sources sorted by traffic volume. SharePromptModal component verified with contextual messaging and all required CTAs.

minor.issue: SharePromptModal.js calls /api/growth/track which doesn't exist. Should use /api/growth/event instead. The main analytics via trackEvent (GA4) still works.

details: GET /api/ab/segmentation?experiment_id=hero_headline returns correct structure
Response includes: success, experiment_id, min_source_sample (100), sources array
Each source has: source, total_impressions, variants, sufficient_data, confidence, winner
Sources sorted by total_impressions descending
sufficient_data is false when any variant has < 100 impressions
Winner only set when sufficient_data=true AND confidence >= 95%
Invalid experiment returns empty sources gracefully
POST /api/public/ab-impression accepts traffic_source field
Tracks impression and cta_click actions
Works with all traffic sources: direct, instagram, organic, referral, internal
Traffic Source Segmentation section visible in A/B Tests tab
data-testid='ab-segmentation-section' present
data-testid='ab-segmentation-table' present
Table columns: Source, Variant, Impressions, CTR %, Confidence %, Winner
'Insufficient data' badge shows for sources with < 100 impressions per variant
Sources displayed: Direct, Instagram, Internal, Organic, Referral
Variants: Emotional (Control), Prestige (Challenger)
Note at bottom: 'Min 100 impressions per variant per source required. Sources sorted by traffic volume.'
SharePromptModal component exists with correct structure
Contextual messaging based on context prop: isChallengeWinner (trophy icon), isTrending (trending icon), remixCount > 2 (heart icon), standard (sparkles icon)
CTAs present: Copy Share Link (primary), Share to Instagram (secondary), Share as Reel (third)
Additional CTAs: Send via Message (WhatsApp), Post Online (Twitter)

data-testid attributes: share-prompt-modal, share-prompt-close, share-prompt-title, share-prompt-subtitle, share-prompt-copy-link, share-prompt-instagram, share-prompt-reel, share-prompt-whatsapp, share-prompt-twitter
Analytics tracking: share_prompt_shown, share_dismissed, share_link_copied, share_instagram_clicked, share_reel_clicked, share_completed
Auto-trigger logic in StoryVideoPipeline.js lines 1993-2006
Triggers when: uiState is READY, ForceShareGate has been dismissed (forceShared in sessionStorage), not yet shown for this jobId
3 second delay after ForceShareGate dismissal
Cooldown: once per completed project (stored in sessionStorage as share_prompt_{jobId})
Landing page loads correctly with A/B hero variants
data-variant attribute on hero heading reflects assigned variant
Tested variant: headline_b ('Create award-worthy AI stories in minutes')
POST /api/growth/event tracks share_click, share_viewed, share events
Invalid events correctly rejected with 400 status

action_items: MINOR: Fix SharePromptModal.js line 112 - change /api/growth/track to /api/growth/event for backend tracking (GA4 tracking via trackEvent still works)
critical_code_review_comments: Segmentation endpoint correctly groups ab_events by traffic_source and variant
MIN_SOURCE_SAMPLE = 100 impressions per variant per source for reliable results
Winner requires both sufficient_data AND confidence >= 95%
SharePromptModal uses trackEvent() for GA4 analytics (client-side) - this works correctly
SharePromptModal also tries to call /api/growth/track which doesn't exist - should be /api/growth/event
Auto-share prompt cooldown uses sessionStorage (share_prompt_{jobId}) - resets on browser close
seed_data_creation: A/B experiments seeded on server startup. ab_events collection stores traffic source data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Traffic Source Segmentation for A/B tests is fully functional. Key findings: (1) GET /api/ab/segmentation returns per-source breakdown with impressions, CTR, confidence, winner, (2) Sources sorted by total_impressions descending, (3) 'Insufficient data' badge shows when < 100 impressions per variant per source, (4) Admin Dashboard A/B Tests section shows segmentation table with all required columns. SharePromptModal: (1) Contextual messaging adapts based on context prop, (2) CTAs: Copy Share Link (primary), Share to Instagram (secondary), Share as Reel (third), (3) Auto-triggers 3 seconds after ForceShareGate dismissal, once per project. Minor issue: SharePromptModal calls /api/growth/track which doesn't exist - should be /api/growth/event.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real - no mocking

playwright_results.hero_heading_text: PASS ('Create award-worthy AI stories in minutes')
playwright_results.segmentation_table_headers: PASS (Source, Variant, Impressions, CTR %, Confidence %, Winner)
